title: PackagedAvaritia
body:
PackagedAvaritia is an addon to PackagedAuto and Avaritia, and it adds the ability to automatically craft items made using the Dire Crafting Table. This mod is designed to be able to run without Applied Energistics 2, but installation with it is recommended.

This mod adds the Extreme Package Crafter. To use it, put one next to an Unpackager, and have the Unpackager handle Extreme Crafting recipes, which can be encoded into recipe holders with the Encoder. The crafter, when connected to a ME Network, will automatically eject outputs into the network.

Please make sure that you download the correct version of the mod for the version of Avaritia that you are using.

List of PackagedAvaritia 1.12.2 versions:

  • PackagedAvaritia for Avaritia 1.1x

List of PackagedAvaritia 1.16.5 versions:

  • PackagedAvaritia-Universal for Avaritia Universal
  • PackagedAvaritia-Endless for Avaritia Endless

List of PackagedAvaritia 1.18.2 versions:

  • PackagedAvaritia for Avaritia 1.1x
  • PackagedAvaritia-Universal for Avaritia Universal
  • PackagedAvaritia-Re for Re:Avaritia
  • PackagedAvaritia-Endless for Avaritia Endless

List of PackagedAvaritia 1.19.2 versions:

  • PackagedAvaritia-Universal for Avaritia Universal
  • PackagedAvaritia-Re for Re:Avaritia

List of PackagedAvaritia 1.20.1 versions:

  • PackagedAvaritia-Universal for Avaritia Universal
  • PackagedAvaritia-Neo for AvaritiaNeo
  • PackagedAvaritia-Re for Re:Avaritia

List of PackagedAvaritia 1.21.1 versions:

  • PackagedAvaritia-Neo for AvaritiaNeo
  • PackagedAvaritia-Re for Re:Avaritia
